Test Case Description: Verify homepage loads successfully
Expected Result: Homepage loads without crash, blank page, or major console-facing error UI

Test Case Description: Verify correct environment/domain is opened
Expected Result: URL is correct for Skechers AU staging and page branding matches Skechers AU

Test Case Description: Verify homepage loads over HTTPS
Expected Result: Page loads securely via HTTPS with no certificate warning

Test Case Description: Verify Skechers logo is displayed
Expected Result: Skechers logo is visible, not broken, and aligned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify clicking logo redirects to homepage
Preconditions: User is on homepage or another internal page
Expected Result: User is redirected to homepage

Test Case Description: Verify main navigation menu is displayed
Expected Result: Main navigation items are visible and readable

Test Case Description: Verify each top navigation item is clickable
Steps: 1. Click each main menu item one by one
Expected Result: Each item opens the correct destination/category page

Test Case Description: Verify hover state for desktop navigation
Expected Result: Hover styling appears correctly and submenu opens where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify submenu content under navigation
Preconditions: Desktop viewport, menu with submenu exists
Steps: 1. Hover a nav item with submenu
Expected Result: Submenu opens with correct categories, links, and layout

Test Case Description: Verify search icon/input is displayed
Expected Result: Search icon or search bar is visible

Test Case Description: Verify search can be opened from homepage
Expected Result: Search overlay/dropdown/input opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify search with valid keyword from homepage
Expected Result: User is redirected to search results page with matching products

Test Case Description: Verify search with invalid/non-matching keyword
Expected Result: No-result state is shown correctly without UI break

Test Case Description: Verify account icon is displayed
Expected Result: Account icon/link is visible

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist icon is displayed
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/link is visible

Test Case Description: Verify mini-cart/cart icon is displayed
Expected Result: Cart icon/link is visible

Test Case Description: Verify cart count default state for guest user
Expected Result: Cart count is hidden or shows 0 correctly

Test Case Description: Verify top promo/announcement bar is displayed
Expected Result: Promo bar is visible with correct content and styling

Test Case Description: Verify promo bar link/button navigation
Expected Result: User is redirected to the correct landing page

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner is displayed
Expected Result: Hero banner image/text/CTA displays correctly

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner CTA navigation
Expected Result: User is redirected to the correct page

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner content matches design/campaign
Steps: 1. Compare banner title, image, CTA, promo copy
Expected Result: Banner content matches expected staging content

Test Case Description: Verify hero banner image is not broken
Expected Result: Image loads correctly with proper dimensions and no distortion

Test Case Description: Verify homepage carousel can slide manually
Expected Result: Carousel moves correctly between slides

Test Case Description: Verify carousel indicators/dots work
Expected Result: Corresponding slide is displayed

Test Case Description: Verify auto-rotation behavior if applicable
Expected Result: Carousel rotates automatically at expected interval

Test Case Description: Verify promotional content tiles are displayed
Expected Result: Promo tiles/cards appear correctly with image/text/CTA

Test Case Description: Verify each promo tile CTA redirects correctly
Expected Result: Each tile redirects to the correct page

Test Case Description: Verify featured category links are displayed
Expected Result: Category entry points are visible and labeled correctly

Test Case Description: Verify featured category links navigate correctly
Expected Result: Correct PLP/category page opens

Test Case Description: Verify featured product carousel is displayed
Expected Result: Product cards are visible with consistent layout

Test Case Description: Verify product card displays required elements
Expected Result: Product image, name, price, and CTA/interaction are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify clicking product image/name opens PDP
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify product price formatting for AU store
Expected Result: Price format is correct for AU locale/currency

Test Case Description: Verify sale/discount badges display correctly
Expected Result: Sale label and price presentation are correct

Test Case Description: Verify out-of-stock/low-stock representation if shown on homepage
Expected Result: Stock messaging/state is correct and consistent

Test Case Description: Verify quick add/quick view behavior if available
Expected Result: Modal/panel opens correctly without page break

Test Case Description: Verify editorial/content sections load correctly
Expected Result: Content blocks display with proper alignment and spacing

Test Case Description: Verify newsletter/email signup section is displayed
Expected Result: Signup form is visible and usable

Test Case Description: Verify newsletter signup with valid email
Expected Result: Success state/message is shown

Test Case Description: Verify validation for invalid email format
Expected Result: Proper validation message is shown

Test Case Description: Verify footer is displayed
Expected Result: Footer is visible and layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify footer links are clickable
Expected Result: Each link opens the correct destination

Test Case Description: Verify social media icons/links
Expected Result: Correct social page opens in expected behavior

Test Case Description: Verify copyright/legal text is present
Expected Result: Legal/copyright text is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on homepage
Expected Result: No overlap between sticky header, chat widget, cards, banners, or footer

Test Case Description: Verify text is readable and not truncated
Expected Result: Text is fully visible and readable across sections

Test Case Description: Verify images maintain aspect ratio
Steps: 1. Inspect banners, product images, promo tiles
Expected Result: Images are not stretched, cropped incorrectly, or pixelated

Test Case Description: Verify homepage in desktop viewport
Expected Result: Layout is stable and aligned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage in tablet viewport
Expected Result: Layout adapts correctly with no broken components

Test Case Description: Verify homepage in mobile viewport
Expected Result: Layout is mobile-friendly, scroll works, no horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify hamburger menu on mobile
Expected Result: Mobile menu opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify closing hamburger menu
Expected Result: Menu closes correctly

Test Case Description: Verify mobile navigation links
Expected Result: User is redirected correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage loads within acceptable time
Expected Result: Key homepage content loads within acceptable performance expectation

Test Case Description: Verify page refresh does not break homepage
Expected Result: Homepage reloads consistently without errors

Test Case Description: Verify homepage on Chrome
Expected Result: Homepage functions correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage on Safari
Expected Result: Homepage functions correctly

Test Case Description: Verify homepage on Firefox/Edge if supported
Expected Result: Homepage functions correctly

Test Case Description: Verify page title is correct
Expected Result: Page title matches expected Skechers AU homepage title

Test Case Description: Verify favicon is displayed
Expected Result: Favicon appears correctly

Test Case Description: Verify broken link behavior from homepage
Expected Result: No visible homepage link leads to 404/500/unexpected page

Test Case Description: Verify guest user can browse homepage without forced login
Steps: 1. Open homepage and interact with content
Expected Result: User can browse homepage freely without auth blocker

Test Case Description: Verify homepage click events fire for hero/banner/category/product interactions
Steps: 1. Click hero CTA 2. Click category tile 3. Click product card
Expected Result: Expected analytics events are triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify keyboard navigation on homepage
Expected Result: Focus moves logically and visible focus state appears

Test Case Description: Verify CTA buttons/links have accessible labels
Expected Result: Buttons/links have meaningful labels and are identifiable

Test Case Description: Verify contrast/readability of homepage text
Expected Result: Text remains readable against background

Test Case Description: Verify AU-specific content/currency/shipping message if applicable
Steps: 1. Inspect currency, promo wording, region messaging
Expected Result: AU localization is shown correctly

Test Case Description: Verify sticky header behavior on scroll
Expected Result: Sticky header behaves as designed and does not obstruct content

Test Case Description: Verify back-to-top functionality if available
Expected Result: Page scrolls back to top correctly
